articles.description:
Big move from Docker here adding support for defining AI agents directly in Compose files, plus a new cloud “Offload” service for GPU workloads. Seems like they’re aiming to make agentic and AI-based apps as easy to deploy as microservices were a decade ago. Curious how folks see this fitting into existing workflows—or if people have tried the beta yet?https://devclass.com/2025/07/10/docker-adds-ai-agents-to-compose-along-with-gpu-powered-cloud-offload-service/
